_meta.description: Canonical claim registry for Perseus Computing public surfaces. Every public figure derives from here. When a benchmark re-runs, update THIS file only; scripts/render_claims.py regenerates manifest strings and tests/test_claims_sync.py fails CI if any surface drifts.

tool_schema_reduction.detail: canonical-only tool advertising: each Vault tool is published once instead of three aliased copies (mimir_/mneme_/perseus_vault_), so the advertised schema is one third of the aliased surface
tool_schema_reduction.source: perseus-vault src/mcp.rs advertise-time alias synthesis (vault PR #548)
tool_schema_reduction.label: derived

vault_tool_count.source: perseus-vault CLAIMS-AUDIT.md (source integer 57; published as 55+ per naming convention)

token_reduction_pct.detail: 488->27 avg prompt tokens, 200-request A/B, 0 ms P99 overhead
token_reduction_pct.label: synthetic
token_reduction_pct.note: Retired 2026-07-16 (#803): harness is asymmetric. State A adds a hard-coded +250 token orientation penalty (benchmark/telemetry/hooks.py); State B counts only the compiled context and drops the user prompt; both arms are stub calls so the 0 ms overhead is by construction. Do not publish any of 94% / 488->27 / 0 ms until the honest re-run in #804 lands.

cold_warm_speedup.detail: cold 619.10s -> warm 1.014s across 22,528 varied directives (22 types) against the real Perseus repo; the artifact's own headline figure. The previously published 1,190x was the best single block, not the average; retired 2026-07-16 (#803)
cold_warm_speedup.label: measured

longmemeval_qa.detail: plain mean of 3 runs (72.8/73.6/75.0); longmemeval_s 500, gpt-4o-2024-08-06 answerer + official per-type judge
longmemeval_qa.label: measured

vault_durable_write_100k.detail: durable sustained write @100K -- DISTINCT from in-memory bulk insert
vault_durable_write_100k.label: measured

vault_bulk_insert.detail: in-memory bulk insert, 100K in 1.01s -- NOT a sustained durable write rate
vault_bulk_insert.label: unverified
vault_bulk_insert.note: Retired 2026-07-16 (#803): no artifact exists anywhere in the perseus-vault repo; the only source was the README sentence itself. Vault-side removal tracked in perseus-vault#702. Use vault_durable_write_100k (signed scale report) instead.

hybrid_recall_speedup.detail: 295.5->80.9 ms p50 @100K on AMD64/Windows box (NOT MI300X)
hybrid_recall_speedup.label: measured

mi300x_dollar_per_agent_hr.detail: $0.143 vs $1.68/agent-hr (2xH100); hardware economics, NOT a customer cost-savings claim
mi300x_dollar_per_agent_hr.label: measured

beam_correctness.detail: 100% gauntlet correctness at every BEAM token tier (128K/500K/1M/10M); the embedded bi-temporal gauntlet reused verbatim, offline, lean FTS5 + bi-temporal binary
beam_correctness.label: measured

beam_determinism.detail: two independent runs produce an identical PASS/FAIL signature at every tier (128K/500K/1M/10M)
beam_determinism.label: measured

beam_as_of_p50_10m.detail: point-lookup as_of p50 at the 10M-token tier; stays flat from 128K (22.08 ms) to 10M (23.07 ms), 40 samples/tier
beam_as_of_p50_10m.label: measured

beam_scale_10m.detail: top tier = 153,846 filler entities, ~10.1M tokens (10,115,374), 332.43s populate; Linux/Unraid
beam_scale_10m.label: measured

cost_savings_pct.detail: fewer dollars at +11.7 pts accuracy; Baseline-A (full-context) UPPER BOUND, n=60 stratified, rate-invariant; per-type gate (knowledge-update regressed)
cost_savings_pct.label: illustrative-baseline-A
cost_savings_pct.note: Owner decision 2026-07-14: keep behind the illustrative calculator / signed cert context; do NOT publish as a marketing headline.

binary_size.note: No size-measurement artifact; README ~8MB and legacy 3.7MB both unbacked. Do not publish a hard size.

vs_llm_speedup_301x.note: extreme_week_results.json absent from main. Do not publish until an artifact is committed.

enterprise_roi_90pct.note: extreme_enterprise_results_full.json absent (broken link). Do not publish.
